name: Jasper Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Jasper Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing therapeutics targeting mast cell driven diseases, including Chronic Spontaneous Urticaria (CSU), Chronic Inducible Urticaria (CIndU), and asthma. Its lead product candidate, briquilimab, is a monoclonal antibody that blocks the SCF/KIT pathway to deplete mast cells.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing therapeutics targeting mast cell driven diseases such as Chronic Spontaneous Urticaria (CSU), Chronic Inducible Urticaria (CIndU) and asthma.
